metadata.user-data:
#cloud-config
package_update: true
packages:
  - docker.io
  - docker-compose-plugin
runcmd:
  - [ sh, -c, "usermod -aG docker ubuntu" ]
  - [ sh, -c, "mkdir -p /opt/app" ]
  - [ sh, -c, "cat >/opt/app/compose.yaml <<'YAML'
version: '3.9'
services:
  frontend:
    image: nginx:alpine
    ports:
      - '80:80'
    restart: unless-stopped
  backend:
    image: nginx:alpine
    restart: unless-stopped
  analytics:
    image: nginx:alpine
    restart: unless-stopped
YAML" ]
  - [ sh, -c, "docker compose -f /opt/app/compose.yaml up -d" ]

db_user_password.description: DB user password (store in Secret Manager/Lockbox!)

enable_zone_d.description: Whether to create resources in zone d (3rd app VM)

ssh_public_key.description: SSH public key content to inject into VMs (e.g., 'ssh-ed25519 AAAA... user@host')

v4_cidr_a.description: CIDR for zone a private subnet

v4_cidr_b.description: CIDR for zone b private subnet

v4_cidr_d.description: CIDR for zone d private subnet
